title: Add URL shortener feature to Sandhya Stors website

requirements.text: Add a URL shortener section to the Sandhya Stors homepage that allows users to paste a long URL and generate a shortened version

quotes: Create Second link convert to short link

acceptanceCriteria: A new section appears on the homepage with an input field for long URLs
Users can submit a URL and receive a shortened version
The shortened URLs are functional and redirect to the original URLs
The section maintains the warm, inviting design aesthetic of the existing site

requirements.text: Create backend functionality to store URL mappings with unique short codes and handle redirects from short URLs to original URLs
acceptanceCriteria: Backend stores mappings between short codes and original URLs
Backend generates unique short codes for each URL
Backend provides an endpoint to create new shortened URLs
Backend provides an endpoint to retrieve original URLs from short codes

requirements.text: Display the generated shortened URL to users with a copy-to-clipboard button for easy sharing
acceptanceCriteria: After generating a short URL, it is displayed prominently to the user
A copy button allows users to copy the shortened URL to clipboard
Visual feedback confirms when the URL has been copied

constraints: Maintain the existing warm, earthy color scheme and neighborhood convenience store aesthetic
Keep the URL shortener as an additional section on the homepage, not a separate page
Do not modify the existing services information or WhatsApp contact integration
nonGoals: Custom vanity URLs or user-chosen short codes
User accounts or authentication for URL management
QR code generation for shortened URLs
